2606.00609.title: CARE-RL: Capability-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Mitigating Cross-Domain Conflicts
2606.00609.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards has achieved strong progress in reasoning-oriented LLMs, but extending it to multi-domain RL remains challenging due to reward unreliability in non-verifiable tasks and capability interference across domains. We propose CARE-RL to combine protocol-aware reward generation with capability-aware optimization for mitigating cross-domain conflicts. For non-verifiable tasks, the Protocol-Aware Generative Reward Model (PA-GRM) constructs prompt-level evaluation protocols and schemas before producing trace-conditioned rewards, enabling task-adaptive yet comparable evaluation of open-ended responses. For multi-domain optimization, Direction-Aware Capability Subspace Projection (DACSP) extracts historical capability directions from previous RL stages and modulates later updates by amplifying aligned components, suppressing conflicting components, and preserving orthogonal updates. Experiments across math, chat, and instruction-following benchmarks show that CARE-RL consistently outperforms standard multi-domain RL baselines, achieving Total Avg scores of 47.9 and 50.7 on Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-4B, respectively.
2606.00609.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）與可驗證獎勵在以推理為導向的大型語言模型（LLMs）中取得了顯著進展，但將其擴展到多領域強化學習仍然具有挑戰性，這是因為在不可驗證任務中的獎勵不可靠以及跨領域能力的干擾。我們提出了CARE-RL，將協議感知獎勵生成與能力感知優化結合，以減輕跨領域衝突。對於不可驗證的任務，協議感知生成獎勵模型（PA-GRM）在生成基於追蹤的獎勵之前，構建了提示級評估協議和方案，使得對開放式回應的評估既具適應性又可比較。對於多領域優化，方向感知能力子空間投影（DACSP）從之前的強化學習階段提取歷史能力方向，並通過放大對齊的組件、抑制衝突的組件以及保留正交更新來調整後續更新。在數學、聊天和遵循指令的基準測試中，實驗顯示CARE-RL始終超越標準的多領域強化學習基準，在Qwen2.5-7B和Qwen3-4B上分別達到總平均分數47.9和50.7。
2606.00609.author: Rui Zhang et.al.
2606.00609.authors: Rui Zhang, Xinle Wu, Yao Lu
